AR1.justification: Filed the AI-generated TLDR directly in resources/ as durable reference, which is precisely the weak-response routing the scenario calls out — an unverified summary is not source-grade reference material.

AR2.justification: Not a procedure scenario — routing question only, so artifact-binding is n/a.

AR3.justification: Relative paths, ISO-dated daybook, followups.md edit; references resolve.

AR4.justification: Followup is append-style and daybook is dated, but the resource stub sits in resources/ root and would need to be moved (not just appended) if more papers accumulate, creating a silent mutation risk on later promotion.
